form.intro-text: Select a beneficial owner who will receive a link to upload a document on behalf of the business. Only the beneficial owner you select here will be able to upload the requested document.

name.label: Document name
name.tooltip: Specify a clear name for the document to help users understand what kind of document to upload.

identifier.label: Identifier
identifier.tooltip: Use this string to retrieve the document from the vault.

error.invalid: Identifier can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens

note.label: Note for the beneficial owner (optional)
note.placeholder: We'd need you to check if there's a typo in the address information you provided...

confirmation.title: Link generated!
confirmation.description: Share this link with the beneficial owner. They will be asked to login and securely provide the requested information
confirmation.expiration: Link will automatically expire in {{duration}} day(s)

sent.description: Link was sent to the beneficial owner
